steps.title: Identify the emphasis requirement
steps.content: To “emphasize” the number of gold medals Daniel Dias won, the choice must make that specific count stand out as the key focus.

steps.title: Evaluate the choices
steps.content: Choice A explicitly states both the total medal count (thirty-eight) and isolates the gold medal count (twenty-five) with an em dash to emphasize it as a key detail. Choices B, C, and D fail to state the specific number of gold medals—B mentions him as a “multiple gold medalist” without the count, C doesn't name him at all, and D states the total without the gold breakdown. By directly stating and highlighting the gold medal number as a separate detail, A creates the emphasis the question asks for. That matches choice A — A is correct.
